'''Friyahrr''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]], and an associate of [[Dayla Kev]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Along with fellow Wookiee [[Fahraark]], Friyahrr shipped a group of [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]] to ''[[Galactic Horizon]]'' to help in Dayla's revenge on [[Milac Troper]].<ref name="GC6" />
